vecode.name: Vecode — Port Platform Reconstruction
vecode.context: 4-Month Radical Transformation: I inherited a critical operating system built in procedural PHP (monolith of +110 files) with severe latencies and insecure code. My task was to rebuild it from scratch using modern architecture to guarantee real-time weighing and inventory.
vecode.p1_desc: Architected a modern REST API from zero, completely eliminating 'Spaghetti' code. Implemented solid design patterns (MVC), a robust roles/permissions system, and deep abstraction with Eloquent ORM. Scaled from SQL injections to a secure, maintainable codebase.
vecode.p2_desc: Built the entire interface as a fluid SPA. Eliminated the constant page reloads of the legacy system, achieving an immediate user experience and clean global states using React and TailwindCSS.
vecode.p3_desc: Migrated infrastructure to Local Ubuntu with CloudPanel and automated deployments via GitHub Actions. This halved operational costs and load times (vs AWS/Azure), ensuring 24/7 port high availability.

stealth.name: Deep Tech Startup in Stealth Mode
stealth.context: The Origin: This project was born during an operational port meeting upon realizing that vessel weight certification (Draft Survey) is a century-old, manual process fraught with extreme financial and vital risks. I founded the startup to completely replace this process with an autonomous AI & drone workflow yielding sub-centimeter precision in seconds.
stealth.p1_desc: Architected a multi-model pipeline integrating Neural Networks (Object Detection, Instance Segmentation, Industrial OCR) to process draft marks under severe rust and wave conditions. Developed the core IP: a physics-based algorithm with mathematical transforms that autonomously reconstructs the 'True Still Water Level'.
stealth.p2_desc: Built a modular asynchronous architecture handling autonomous inspection orchestration, physical sea-state modeling, photorealistic evidentiary PDF generation, and OSINT telemetry. Implemented an 'offline-first' hybrid (Edge-Cloud) synchronization strategy and containerized the entire stack.
stealth.p3_desc: Developed the complete Transitional SPA/PWA featuring a real-time telemetry dashboard, drag-and-drop drone footage ingestion, and a digital port map—purpose-built for harsh onboard tablet environments.
stealth.p4_desc: Designed the Enterprise B2B SaaS modeling, TAM/SAM/SOM financial projections, and mapped institutional technical certifications (DNV). Combined deep maritime logistics fluency with proven high-stress Full-Stack engineering.

rows.capabilities: Object Detection, Instance Segmentation, Industrial OCR, Computer Vision, Synthetic Data.
Statistical algorithms, noise cancellation, temporal physical variable validation.
Asynchronous enterprise architectures, Relational ORMs, REST APIs & Secure JWT APIs.
SPA Architecture / Modern Reactive Frameworks, Offline-First PWAs, i18n, Dynamic UI/UX.
Containerization, Immutable Deployments, CI/CD Pipelines, Edge-Cloud Hybrid.
